subcodes.first_line: Sanctified praise, transcending all that the servant possesseth, beseemeth my Lord, Who hath caused the river of His mercy to flow from the Pen [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد مقدس عن کل ما عند الخادم مولائی را لایق و سزاست که فرات رحمتش را از قلم
subcodes.subjects: @proclamation to people of the Bayan, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @superiority; incomparability of the Word of God, @praise and encouragement, @rejection by the people of the Bayan
